# Workbox 指南

## Why Workbox?

Workbox 是 Google 官方的 Service Worker 庫，提供：

- 🎯 **Battle-tested** 快取策略
- 📦 **Precaching** 自動資源版本管理
- 🔄 **Background Sync** 離線表單提交
- 🧹 **自動清理** 過期快取
- 📘 **TypeScript** 完整類型支持

## Installation

```bash
# Webpack
npm install workbox-webpack-plugin

# Vite
npm install @vite-pwa/vite-plugin

# 手動使用（CDN）
importScripts('https://storage.googleapis.com/workbox-cdn/releases/6.5.4/workbox-sw.js');
```

## Vite + Workbox

### 配置

```javascript
// vite.config.js
import { defineConfig } from 'vite';
import { VitePWA } from 'vite-plugin-pwa';

export default defineConfig({
  plugins: [
    VitePWA({
      registerType: 'autoUpdate',
      includeAssets: ['favicon.ico', 'robots.txt', 'apple-touch-icon.png'],
      
      manifest: {
        name: 'My App',
        short_name: 'App',
        theme_color: '#ffffff',
        icons: [
          {
            src: 'pwa-192x192.png',
            sizes: '192x192',
            type: 'image/png'
          },
          {
            src: 'pwa-512x512.png',
            sizes: '512x512',
            type: 'image/png'
          }
        ]
      },
      
      workbox: {
        globPatterns: ['**/*.{js,css,html,ico,png,svg}'],
        
        runtimeCaching: [
          {
            urlPattern: /^https:\/\/api\.example\.com\/.*/i,
            handler: 'NetworkFirst',
            options: {
              cacheName: 'api-cache',
              expiration: {
                maxEntries: 100,
                maxAgeSeconds: 60 * 60 * 24 // 24 hours
              },
              cacheableResponse: {
                statuses: [0, 200]
              }
            }
          },
          {
            urlPattern: /\.(?:png|jpg|jpeg|svg|gif)$/,
            handler: 'CacheFirst',
            options: {
              cacheName: 'image-cache',
              expiration: {
                maxEntries: 50,
                maxAgeSeconds: 60 * 60 * 24 * 30 // 30 days
              }
            }
          }
        ]
      }
    })
  ]
});
```

## Manual Service Worker

自定義 Service Worker 使用 Workbox：

```javascript
// sw.js
import { precacheAndRoute } from 'workbox-precaching';
import { registerRoute } from 'workbox-routing';
import { CacheFirst, NetworkFirst, StaleWhileRevalidate } from 'workbox-strategies';
import { ExpirationPlugin } from 'workbox-expiration';
import { CacheableResponsePlugin } from 'workbox-cacheable-response';

// Precache static assets (generated by build tool)
precacheAndRoute(self.__WB_MANIFEST);

// Cache images with CacheFirst
registerRoute(
  ({ request }) => request.destination === 'image',
  new CacheFirst({
    cacheName: 'images',
    plugins: [
      new CacheableResponsePlugin({
        statuses: [0, 200]
      }),
      new ExpirationPlugin({
        maxEntries: 60,
        maxAgeSeconds: 30 * 24 * 60 * 60 // 30 days
      })
    ]
  })
);

// Cache API responses with NetworkFirst
registerRoute(
  ({ url }) => url.pathname.startsWith('/api/'),
  new NetworkFirst({
    cacheName: 'api-responses',
    plugins: [
      new CacheableResponsePlugin({
        statuses: [0, 200]
      }),
      new ExpirationPlugin({
        maxEntries: 100,
        maxAgeSeconds: 24 * 60 * 60 // 24 hours
      })
    ]
  })
);

// Cache page navigations with NetworkFirst
registerRoute(
  ({ request }) => request.mode === 'navigate',
  new NetworkFirst({
    cacheName: 'pages',
    plugins: [
      new CacheableResponsePlugin({
        statuses: [0, 200]
      })
    ]
  })
);

// Cache Google Fonts
registerRoute(
  ({ url }) => url.origin === 'https://fonts.googleapis.com' ||
              url.origin === 'https://fonts.gstatic.com',
  new StaleWhileRevalidate({
    cacheName: 'google-fonts',
    plugins: [
      new ExpirationPlugin({
        maxEntries: 20
      })
    ]
  })
);
```

## Workbox Strategies

### CacheFirst

```javascript
import { CacheFirst } from 'workbox-strategies';

registerRoute(
  /\.(?:js|css)$/,
  new CacheFirst({
    cacheName: 'static-resources',
    plugins: [
      new ExpirationPlugin({
        maxEntries: 60,
        maxAgeSeconds: 30 * 24 * 60 * 60 // 30 days
      })
    ]
  })
);
```

### NetworkFirst

```javascript
import { NetworkFirst } from 'workbox-strategies';

registerRoute(
  ({ url }) => url.pathname.startsWith('/api/'),
  new NetworkFirst({
    cacheName: 'api-cache',
    networkTimeoutSeconds: 10,
    plugins: [
      new ExpirationPlugin({
        maxEntries: 50,
        maxAgeSeconds: 5 * 60 // 5 minutes
      })
    ]
  })
);
```

### StaleWhileRevalidate

```javascript
import { StaleWhileRevalidate } from 'workbox-strategies';

registerRoute(
  ({ request }) => request.destination === 'image',
  new StaleWhileRevalidate({
    cacheName: 'images',
    plugins: [
      new ExpirationPlugin({
        maxEntries: 50,
        maxAgeSeconds: 7 * 24 * 60 * 60 // 7 days
      })
    ]
  })
);
```

### NetworkOnly

```javascript
import { NetworkOnly } from 'workbox-strategies';

registerRoute(
  ({ url }) => url.pathname.startsWith('/api/analytics'),
  new NetworkOnly()
);
```

### CacheOnly

```javascript
import { CacheOnly } from 'workbox-strategies';

registerRoute(
  ({ url }) => url.pathname.startsWith('/offline/'),
  new CacheOnly({
    cacheName: 'offline-content'
  })
);
```

## Plugins

### ExpirationPlugin

控制快取大小和生命週期：

```javascript
import { ExpirationPlugin } from 'workbox-expiration';

new ExpirationPlugin({
  maxEntries: 50,                    // 最多 50 個項目
  maxAgeSeconds: 7 * 24 * 60 * 60,   // 7 天
  purgeOnQuotaError: true            // 配額不足時清理
})
```

### CacheableResponsePlugin

僅快取特定狀態碼：

```javascript
import { CacheableResponsePlugin } from 'workbox-cacheable-response';

new CacheableResponsePlugin({
  statuses: [0, 200],                // 成功的請求
  headers: {
    'X-Is-Cacheable': 'true'         // 或特定標頭
  }
})
```

### BackgroundSyncPlugin

離線時排隊請求：

```javascript
import { BackgroundSyncPlugin } from 'workbox-background-sync';
import { NetworkOnly } from 'workbox-strategies';

const bgSyncPlugin = new BackgroundSyncPlugin('formQueue', {
  maxRetentionTime: 24 * 60 // 重試 24 小時
});

registerRoute(
  ({ url }) => url.pathname === '/api/submit',
  new NetworkOnly({
    plugins: [bgSyncPlugin]
  }),
  'POST'
);
```

### BroadcastUpdatePlugin

通知客戶端快取更新：

```javascript
import { BroadcastUpdatePlugin } from 'workbox-broadcast-update';

new BroadcastUpdatePlugin({
  headersToCheck: ['content-length', 'etag', 'last-modified']
})

// 客戶端監聽更新
navigator.serviceWorker.addEventListener('message', (event) => {
  if (event.data.type === 'CACHE_UPDATED') {
    const { cacheName, updatedURL } = event.data.payload;
    console.log('Cache updated:', updatedURL);
  }
});
```

## Precaching

### 自動生成 Precache Manifest

```javascript
// workbox-config.js
module.exports = {
  globDirectory: 'dist/',
  globPatterns: [
    '**/*.{html,js,css,png,svg,jpg,gif,json}'
  ],
  swDest: 'dist/sw.js',
  swSrc: 'src/sw.js'
};
```

```bash
# 生成 Service Worker
npx workbox generateSW workbox-config.js

# 或注入 manifest 到現有 SW
npx workbox injectManifest workbox-config.js
```

### 手動 Precaching

```javascript
// sw.js
import { precacheAndRoute } from 'workbox-precaching';

precacheAndRoute([
  { url: '/index.html', revision: 'v1.2.3' },
  { url: '/styles.css', revision: 'abc123' },
  { url: '/app.js', revision: 'def456' }
]);

// 或使用構建工具生成
precacheAndRoute(self.__WB_MANIFEST);
```

## Background Sync

### 表單提交範例

```javascript
// sw.js
import { BackgroundSyncPlugin } from 'workbox-background-sync';
import { registerRoute } from 'workbox-routing';
import { NetworkOnly } from 'workbox-strategies';

const bgSyncPlugin = new BackgroundSyncPlugin('contactFormQueue', {
  maxRetentionTime: 24 * 60
});

registerRoute(
  '/api/contact',
  new NetworkOnly({
    plugins: [bgSyncPlugin]
  }),
  'POST'
);

// 客戶端
async function submitForm(data) {
  try {
    const response = await fetch('/api/contact', {
      method: 'POST',
      headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' },
      body: JSON.stringify(data)
    });
    
    if (response.ok) {
      showMessage('Form submitted successfully');
    }
  } catch (error) {
    showMessage('Saved offline. Will sync when connected.');
  }
}
```

## Advanced Configuration

### 自定義 Cache Names

```javascript
import { setCacheNameDetails } from 'workbox-core';

setCacheNameDetails({
  prefix: 'my-app',
  suffix: 'v1',
  precache: 'precache',
  runtime: 'runtime'
});

// 生成的快取名稱：
// - my-app-precache-v1
// - my-app-runtime-v1
```

### 日誌設置

```javascript
import { setLogLevel } from 'workbox-core';

// 開發環境
if (process.env.NODE_ENV === 'development') {
  setLogLevel('debug');
} else {
  setLogLevel('error');
}
```

### 跳過等待

```javascript
import { clientsClaim } from 'workbox-core';

self.skipWaiting();
clientsClaim();
```

### 自定義 Fetch 處理

```javascript
import { registerRoute } from 'workbox-routing';

registerRoute(
  ({ url, request, event }) => {
    return url.pathname.startsWith('/custom/');
  },
  async ({ url, request, event, params }) => {
    // 自定義邏輯
    const cacheKey = new URL(url);
    cacheKey.searchParams.set('timestamp', Date.now());
    
    const response = await fetch(cacheKey);
    return response;
  }
);
```

## Webpack Integration

```javascript
// webpack.config.js
const { GenerateSW } = require('workbox-webpack-plugin');

module.exports = {
  // ... other webpack config
  plugins: [
    new GenerateSW({
      clientsClaim: true,
      skipWaiting: true,
      runtimeCaching: [
        {
          urlPattern: /^https:\/\/api/,
          handler: 'NetworkFirst',
          options: {
            cacheName: 'api',
            expiration: {
              maxEntries: 50,
              maxAgeSeconds: 300
            }
          }
        }
      ]
    })
  ]
};
```

## Testing

```javascript
// sw.test.js
import { precacheAndRoute } from 'workbox-precaching';

describe('Service Worker', () => {
  it('precaches assets', () => {
    const manifest = [
      { url: '/index.html', revision: '1' },
      { url: '/app.js', revision: '2' }
    ];
    
    precacheAndRoute(manifest);
    
    // Test that assets are cached
  });
});
```

## Migration from Custom SW

從自定義 Service Worker 遷移到 Workbox：

**Before (Custom)**:
```javascript
self.addEventListener('fetch', (event) => {
  event.respondWith(
    caches.match(event.request).then((cached) => {
      return cached || fetch(event.request);
    })
  );
});
```

**After (Workbox)**:
```javascript
import { registerRoute } from 'workbox-routing';
import { CacheFirst } from 'workbox-strategies';

registerRoute(
  () => true,
  new CacheFirst()
);
```

更簡潔、更可靠、內建錯誤處理和過期管理！
